phase_name: Agent Evaluation — Phase E Eval Enhancement

phase_e1.scope: Runner加固: Recorder集成, Timeout, 并发, Allowlist, 回归检测
phase_e1.actual_changes: ~350 lines changed across 6 files, 25 integration tests (was 18), 4 new reporter unit tests

phase_e2.scope: 新套件: LlmJudge + provider(10) + memory(12) + e2e(8) + CLI分发
phase_e2.actual_changes: ~367 lines changed in 9 existing files + 3 new suite modules + 8 e2e fixtures, 26 new tests (85 unit + 25 integration = 110 total in octo-eval)

phase_e3.scope: 多轨道: CLI/Server target + BFCL适配 + eval.toml + CI

notes: Phase E2 COMPLETE. All 5 tasks implemented: E2-T1 LlmJudgeScorer with async scoring at runner level (scorer.rs, runner.rs, task.rs, loader.rs), E2-T2 Provider fault tolerance suite with FaultProvider + 10 tests (suites/provider.rs), E2-T3 Memory consistency suite testing 4 layers with 12 tests (suites/memory.rs), E2-T4 E2E programming suite with 8 Python fixtures and PatchVerifyScorer (suites/e2e.rs + datasets/e2e_fixtures/), E2-T5 CLI dispatch for direct API suites + full verification 1917 tests passing. Design review identified 25 gaps (7 CRITICAL) which were all resolved: Scorer async problem solved at runner level, Provider/Memory suites use direct API testing instead of agent loop, FaultProvider for error injection, CLI dispatch via cmd_run_direct_suite().
